goal: Add a side-effect-free authority-review decision gate for runtime patch authority-review intake while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Runtime patch authority-review intake can be reduced to an approve/defer/reject gate without issuing a permit.
Decision, authority, and rationale refs are required.
Only approve can be ready; defer and reject remain blocked.
assumptions: Actual permit issue preflight, issuance, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Approved, missing decision ref, and deferred decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-101 accepted runtime patch request packets for authority review without issuing a permit or enabling execution.
